# AquaCare360™ by Shubham India

Complete operations, maintenance, and AMC care for water, wastewater, and swimming pool systems.

## Brand Overview
AquaCare360™ is a specialized water utility management division of **Shubham India** (https://www.shubhamindia.com/). The company provides end-to-end management, daily operations, preventative maintenance, and emergency troubleshooting for water infrastructure.

- **Primary URL**: https://aquacare360.in/
- **Parent Organization**: Shubham India (https://www.shubhamindia.com/)
- **Geographic Coverage**: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India (and national industrial sectors)

---

## Core Services

### 1. Operations & Maintenance (O&M) Contracts
- **Scope**: Daily on-site plant operations by trained professionals.
- **Includes**: Daily log monitoring, process control, preventive maintenance, dosage regulation, water quality analysis, and monthly performance reporting.
- **Target**: RO plants, ETP, STP, softeners, DM plants.

### 2. Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC)
- **Scope**: Scheduled proactive maintenance visits.
- **Includes**: regular health checks, instrument calibration, sand/carbon backwash cycles, water quality tests, and priority emergency breakdown response.

### 3. Comprehensive Annual Maintenance Contracts (CAMC)
- **Scope**: All-inclusive service for complete risk and asset coverage.
- **Includes**: Standard AMC services + full coverage/replacement of spare parts, consumable items, filter media, resins, RO membranes, and emergency replacement labor.

### 4. Chemicals & Spare Parts Supply
- **Scope**: Industrial process chemicals and engineering spares.
- **Includes**: RO membranes, filter media (sand, gravel, activated carbon, manganese dioxide), ion-exchange resins, dosing pumps, cartridge filters, flow meters, and water treatment chemicals.

### 5. Emergency Breakdown Support
- **Scope**: 24/7 on-site emergency troubleshooting.
- **Includes**: Rapid dispatch, process diagnostic audit, system stabilization, and correction.

---

## Industries and Applications Served
- **Manufacturing & Industrial**: ETP & STP management, high-purity RO water.
- **Food & Beverage**: Process water compliance, hygiene control.
- **Pharmaceuticals & Healthcare**: USP grade water systems, hospital STP/ETP.
- **Hospitality (Hotels & Resorts)**: Swimming pools, drinking water, softeners, sewage treatment.
- **Commercial & Residential**: Township STP, high-rise water softeners, rainwater harvesting systems.
- **Municipal & Public Sector**: Large scale drinking water and wastewater treatment plants.

---
